ast.name: log
ast.source: resetting all values to their defaults
ast.target: 正在将所有值重置为默认值

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 Cursor Location 插件

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 Cursor Location 插件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: `ch` is the column the cursor is at in the current line,         `ln` is the current line number,         `ct` is the total line numbers in the file (count).
ast.target: `ch` 是光标在当前行的列位置，         `ln` 是当前行号，         `ct` 是文件中的总行数（计数）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For example, with the default value of '12' the status bar         could be set to a width of 60 if the contents width is 55.
ast.target: 例如，当默认值为 '12' 时，如果内容宽度为 55，则状态栏宽度可设置为 60。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A cursor with just the head is around 70px.         A single selection with head and anchor plus totals is around 250px.         3 selections like the above with individual line counts is around 500px.
ast.target: 仅包含光标头的光标约为 70px。         包含光标头和锚点的单个选区加上总计约为 250px。         类似上述的 3 个选区加上各自的行数约为 500px。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Number of cursor positions that will display           in the status bar before switching to "N cursors".
ast.target: 在切换到 \"N 个光标\" 之前，状态栏中显示的光标位置数量。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Display just the beginning,         just the end, or the full range of a selection.
ast.target: 仅显示选区的开头、         仅显示结尾，或显示选区的完整范围。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Display the total number of characters selected.

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Display the total number of lines selected.

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Pattern to display location information for each cursor.
ast.target: 用于显示每个光标位置信息的模式。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: String to seperate multiple curor locations when         `# of Cursors` is greater than 1. Selecting `custom`         will let you type out your own
ast.target: 当 `光标数量` 大于 1 时，用于分隔多个光标位置的字符串。选择 `自定义`         将允许您输入自己的字符串

ast.name: setName
ast.source: String will be padded by a space on each side.         Consecutive whitespace is squashed to 1 space (per HTML rules).         For example: '/' will be displayed as ' / '
ast.target: 字符串两侧将填充一个空格。         连续的空白字符将被压缩为 1 个空格（根据 HTML 规则）。         例如：'/' 将显示为 ' / '

ast.name: setName
ast.source: String to seperate the beginning and end of a selection           when `Selection Mode` is set to `Full Selection`.           Selecting `custom` will let you type out your own
ast.target: 当 `选区模式` 设置为 `完整选区` 时，用于分隔选区开头和结尾的字符串。           选择 `自定义` 将允许您输入自己的字符串

ast.name: setName
ast.source: String will NOT be padded by a space on each side.           Consecutive whitespace is squashed to 1 space (per HTML rules)           For example: '->' will be displayed as '2->3' and ' -> ' will           be displayed as '2 -> 3'
ast.target: 字符串两侧将不会填充空格。           连续的空白字符将被压缩为 1 个空格（根据 HTML 规则）           例如：'->' 将显示为 '2->3'，而 ' -> ' 将           显示为 '2 -> 3'

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Display the number of lines selected by each cursor.
ast.target: 显示每个光标选中的行数。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Pattern to display number of highlighted lines for each cursor.
ast.target: 用于显示每个光标高亮行数的模式。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: `lc` is the line count and will not be displayed if only one line           is selected or 'Display Cursor Line Count' setting is `false`.           Leading and trailing whitespace is trimmed.
ast.target: `lc` 是行数，如果只选中一行           或 '显示光标行数' 设置为 `false`，则不会显示。           前导和尾随空白字符将被修剪。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add padding to lessen the amount the status bar shifts
ast.target: 添加填充以减少状态栏的移动量

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Amount the status bar will round to when padding.
ast.target: 状态栏在填充时将舍入到的数值。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Multiples of 3 work best, though any positive value will do.
ast.target: 3 的倍数效果最佳，但任何正数都可以。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Display percent thru the document instead of line number
ast.target: 显示文档中的百分比位置而非行号

ast.name: setName
ast.source: How many words vs percent numbers to display.
ast.target: 显示多少个文字描述与百分比数字。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Exclude the frontmatter as part of the document percentage
ast.target: 排除前置信息作为文档百分比的一部分

ast.name: setName
ast.source: What to call the frontmatter when cursor is inside it
ast.target: 当光标位于前置信息内时，如何称呼前置信息

ast.name: setName
ast.source: If you don't like the options provided,         you can set the frontmatter to whaterver         you want with this.
ast.target: 如果您不喜欢提供的选项，         您可以使用此选项将前置信息设置为         您想要的任何内容。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Reset all settings to default values.
ast.target: 将所有设置重置为默认值。
